nodes.label: Watchlist columns are derived from Filter Conditions ONLY (not Signals).
Helper to compute show_score in the same way the endpoint does.
Stage 0 (custom/pool) and Stage 1 (L1) must not show Alpha Score.
Stage 2 (L2) and Stage 3 (L3) must show Alpha Score.
When scoring.selected_rule_ids is empty, legacy filters.conditions[].rule_id is
Default (strict_indicators=False): missing indicator condition is skipped → asse
strict_indicators=True: missing indicator condition FAILS → asset rejected.
strict_indicators=True: asset with bullish indicator passes.
strict_indicators=True: asset with bearish indicator fails.
_apply_filters(strict_indicators=True): asset with no indicator data fails indic
_apply_filters(strict_indicators=False, default): asset with no indicators is NO
